queries.question: For each court reporter, what are the corresponding trial  types?
queries.sql: select courts_reporters.name , trials.trialtype from Courts_Reporters_Trials join Trials on Courts_Reporters_Trials.trialId = Trials.id join Courts_Reporters on Courts_Reporters_Trials.reporterId = Courts_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?trialtype WHERE {
  ?courts_reporters_trials a :Courts_Reporters_Trials .
  ?trials a :Trials .
  ?courts_reporters_trials p:hasTrials ?trials .
  ?courts_reporters a :Courts_Reporters .
  ?courts_reporters_trials p:hasCourts_Reporters ?courts_reporters .
  ?courts_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?trials p:trialType ?trialtype .
}

queries.question: Tell me the case names and types of trials each reporter is covering.
queries.sql: SELECT Trials.caseName, Trials.trialType  from Courts_Reporters_Trials join Trials on Courts_Reporters_Trials.trialId = Trials.id join Courts_Reporters on Courts_Reporters_Trials.reporterId = Courts_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Courts_Reporters_Trials.trialId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Courts_Reporters_Trials.reporterId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Courts_Reporters)

queries.question: Tell me the case names and types of trials each reporter is covering.
queries.sql: select courts_reporters.name , trials.casename , trials.trialtype from Courts_Reporters_Trials join Trials on Courts_Reporters_Trials.trialId = Trials.id join Courts_Reporters on Courts_Reporters_Trials.reporterId = Courts_Reporters.id
queries.sparql:

  ?courts_reporters a :Courts_Reporters .

}

queries.question: What cases are all court reporters equally covering?
queries.sql: SELECT Trials.caseName  from Courts_Reporters_Trials join Trials on Courts_Reporters_Trials.trialId = Trials.id join Courts_Reporters on Courts_Reporters_Trials.reporterId = Courts_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Courts_Reporters_Trials.trialId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Courts_Reporters_Trials.reporterId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Courts_Reporters)

queries.question: what trial types are associated with each court reporter?
queries.sql: SELECT Trials.trialType  from Courts_Reporters_Trials join Trials on Courts_Reporters_Trials.trialId = Trials.id join Courts_Reporters on Courts_Reporters_Trials.reporterId = Courts_Reporters.id   GROUP BY Courts_Reporters_Trials.trialId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Courts_Reporters_Trials.reporterId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Courts_Reporters)

  ?trials a :Trials .
  ?courts_reporters_trials p:hasTrials ?trials .
  ?courts_reporters a :Courts_Reporters .

  ?courts_reporters p:name ?name .
  ?trials p:caseName ?casename .
